frontmatter.title: Foxit PDF Reader - Use after Free - Remote Code Execution Exploit
frontmatter.excerpt: Foxit PDF Reader is vulnerable to use after free vulnerability causing remote code execution

frontmatter.title: Adobe Reader - XFA - ANSI-Unicode Confusion Information Leak
frontmatter.excerpt: Adobe Reader DC is vulnerable to Out of Bounds Read bug, caused by treating ANSI string as Unicode in XFA
